optimizations_applied.name: Zero-Dependency Core Assets
optimizations_applied.description: Three.js and fonts are loaded via reliable CDNs without custom bundles, allowing instantaneous paint times.

optimizations_applied.name: Procedural Sprite Textures
optimizations_applied.description: Dust particle graphics are drawn onto canvas contexts locally, preventing LCP network bottlenecks caused by heavy image assets.

optimizations_applied.name: Optimized Frame integration
optimizations_applied.description: Particle calculations occur within WebGL buffer sweeps directly connected to requestAnimationFrame, avoiding layout thrashing.
